title: Samurai Chariot (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces SC skin3 with Samurai Chariot (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces SC skin3 with Samurai Chariot

This is a custom reskin that I came up with for the AU pack but I decided it's so good I'd release it on its own.

Changes the apparence of your JoJo stand

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
